Bi-Weekly Report
• Steady as She Goes for Dry Bulk While Summer Slowdown Takes a Toll on Volatility - It has been particularly calm
in the dry bulk market, with freight futures volatility hitting multi-year lows and physical activity absent of the jumps
and falls the shipping market is accustomed to. Although it seems freight prices are slowly drifting lower, in general,
dry bulk spot rates have stabilized at particularly strong levels compared to history for this time of the year.
